state.start.name: Start
state.start.description: Enter the explicit SubtitleExtractslator SO graph.

state.read_localpaths.name: Read Local Paths
state.read_localpaths.description: Load skill-side local path memory before runtime resolution.

state.execution_profile_gate.name: Check Execution Profile
state.execution_profile_gate.description: Only ask for execution profile fields when required routing inputs are still missing.

state.ask_execution_profile.name: Ask Execution Profile
state.ask_execution_profile.description: Collect the missing execution profile before routing into single-file or batch processing.

state.route_request_kind.name: Route Request Kind
state.route_request_kind.description: Branch between direct single-file orchestration and queue-driven repetition of the same single-item pipeline.

state.batch_init.name: Initialize Batch Run
state.batch_init.description: Create or resume the centralized queue workspace under <temp-root>/agent-runs/<run-id>/.

state.batch_build_queue.name: Build Or Reconcile Queue
state.batch_build_queue.description: Populate queue.txt, completed.txt, failed.txt, in-progress.txt, and run-notes.md.

state.batch_dispatch_check.name: Check Pending Batch Work
state.batch_dispatch_check.description: Continue until queue.txt is empty or only hard blockers remain. Each pending item re-enters the same single-item workflow path.

state.batch_route_worker.name: Prepare Next Single Run
state.batch_route_worker.description: Load the next pending queue item into the shared single-item pipeline. Batch is a queue wrapper, not a second subtitle business path.

state.batch_subagent_worker.name: Run Worker Subagent
state.batch_subagent_worker.description: Delegate the bounded batch to a worker subagent while preserving centralized queue state semantics.

state.batch_inline_worker.name: Run Inline Worker
state.batch_inline_worker.description: Execute the same bounded worker contract inside the main agent loop when subagents are unavailable.

state.batch_apply_deltas.name: Apply Worker Deltas
state.batch_apply_deltas.description: Apply Completed/Failed/Notes deltas back into the centralized queue files before continuing.

state.batch_cooldown_check.name: Check Cooldown Or Resume
state.batch_cooldown_check.description: Gate delayed serial retries for rate-limited lanes without abandoning the rest of the queue.

state.batch_wait_resume.name: Wait For Resume
state.batch_wait_resume.description: Pause only the affected lane until an external resume signal or cooldown completion arrives.

state.emit_batch_summary.name: Emit Batch Summary
state.emit_batch_summary.description: Emit final queue state, completed outputs, blockers, and resume-relevant notes.

state.check_mode.name: Check Operating Mode
state.check_mode.description: Route CLI and MCP execution according to the explicit execution profile.

state.mcp_preflight.name: Validate MCP Prerequisites
state.mcp_preflight.description: Apply MCP-first policy, check server configuration, and reuse remembered FFmpeg path when available.

state.mcp_setup_check.name: Check MCP Setup
state.mcp_setup_check.description: When MCP is selected, verify whether the current workspace already has a usable subtitle-extractslator MCP entry.

state.ask_mcp_setup.name: Ask MCP Setup Permission
state.ask_mcp_setup.description: Ask whether the workflow may create or update MCP configuration in the current workspace.

state.apply_mcp_setup.name: Apply MCP Setup
state.apply_mcp_setup.description: Delegate MCP config creation or update to the outer agent, preserving unrelated server entries.

state.single_check_input_kind.name: Check Input Kind
state.single_check_input_kind.description: Distinguish subtitle-only translation from media-driven extraction/search workflow.

state.ffmpeg_preflight.name: Validate FFmpeg Path
state.ffmpeg_preflight.description: Check whether FFmpeg and ffprobe are already reachable before media probing or extraction.

state.ffmpeg_path_check.name: Check FFmpeg Readiness
state.ffmpeg_path_check.description: Route directly to media probing when FFmpeg is ready, or ask for a bin directory when runtime tools are still missing.

state.ask_ffmpeg_path.name: Ask FFmpeg Path
state.ask_ffmpeg_path.description: Ask for an FFmpeg bin directory when media operations need runtime tools that are not yet configured.

state.apply_ffmpeg_path.name: Apply FFmpeg Path
state.apply_ffmpeg_path.description: Apply the chosen FFmpeg bin directory and persist it for later runs when requested.

state.probe_media.name: Probe Media
state.probe_media.description: Probe embedded subtitle tracks and detect whether the requested target language already exists.

state.target_track_check.name: Check Existing Target Subtitle
state.target_track_check.description: Exit early when probe shows that the target subtitle already exists.

state.emit_existing_target.name: Emit Existing Target Result
state.emit_existing_target.description: Emit the early-exit result when no extraction or translation is needed.

state.validate_opensubtitles_auth.name: Validate OpenSubtitles Auth
state.validate_opensubtitles_auth.description: Check whether cached OpenSubtitles credentials are still usable before search or download.

state.opensubtitles_auth_check.name: Check OpenSubtitles Auth
state.opensubtitles_auth_check.description: Branch between continuing to OpenSubtitles and pausing for an external relogin.

state.ask_opensubtitles_auth_relogin.name: Request OpenSubtitles Relogin
state.ask_opensubtitles_auth_relogin.description: Pause for an external OpenSubtitles auth login when cached credentials are missing or expired.

state.opensubtitles_search.name: Search OpenSubtitles
state.opensubtitles_search.description: Search candidates in strict serial order using primary and normalized query fallbacks.

state.opensubtitles_candidate_check.name: Check OpenSubtitles Candidates
state.opensubtitles_candidate_check.description: Choose between candidate adoption flow and local extraction fallback.

state.ask_candidate_adoption.name: Ask Candidate Adoption
state.ask_candidate_adoption.description: Ask whether to adopt the highest-ranked OpenSubtitles candidate before falling back to local extraction.

state.adoption_decision.name: Route Adoption Decision
state.adoption_decision.description: Respect the explicit adoption choice and route to download or local extraction.

state.opensubtitles_download_route.name: Route Download Execution
state.opensubtitles_download_route.description: Use CLI tool flow or MCP-owned call flow for the actual candidate download.

state.mcp_download_candidate.name: Download Candidate Via MCP
state.mcp_download_candidate.description: Delegate MCP-owned OpenSubtitles download with explicit fileId and output path contract.

state.cli_download_candidate.name: Download Candidate Via CLI
state.cli_download_candidate.description: Use deterministic CLI download flow with auth-aquire semantics and ranked fallback strategy.

state.opensubtitles_timing_gate.name: Check Whether Timing Validation Is Required
state.opensubtitles_timing_gate.description: Only run subtitle timing check when the candidate confidence or request policy requires it.

state.subtitle_timing_check.name: Run Subtitle Timing Check
state.subtitle_timing_check.description: Compare video duration and subtitle last cue end before accepting a low-confidence candidate.

state.timing_check_result.name: Evaluate Timing Result
state.timing_check_result.description: Accept a candidate with acceptable timing; otherwise advance to the next candidate.

state.advance_candidate_rank.name: Advance Candidate Rank
state.advance_candidate_rank.description: Move to the next candidate without stopping the whole run when one candidate mismatches.

state.downloaded_language_check.name: Check Downloaded Subtitle Language
state.downloaded_language_check.description: When the downloaded subtitle already matches the target language, skip translation and emit output directly.

state.write_downloaded_output.name: Accept Downloaded Target Subtitle
state.write_downloaded_output.description: Persist the downloaded target-language subtitle as the final output artifact.

state.select_source_subtitle_track.name: Select Embedded Source Track
state.select_source_subtitle_track.description: Pick the best embedded fallback subtitle track and classify whether it is text or bitmap-based.

state.source_subtitle_kind_check.name: Check Embedded Source Subtitle Type
state.source_subtitle_kind_check.description: Decide whether the embedded fallback subtitle can be extracted as text directly or must be reconstructed from bitmap images.

state.export_bitmap_subtitle_stream.name: Export Bitmap Subtitle Stream
state.export_bitmap_subtitle_stream.description: Export the selected bitmap subtitle track to a SUP stream before frame decoding.

state.decode_bitmap_subtitle_frames.name: Decode Bitmap Subtitle Frames
state.decode_bitmap_subtitle_frames.description: Decode the SUP stream into timestamped cue images so OCR can rebuild a text subtitle timeline.

state.ocr_bitmap_subtitle_frames.name: OCR Bitmap Subtitle Frames
state.ocr_bitmap_subtitle_frames.description: Run OCR across the timestamped subtitle images and rebuild a text SRT before translation.

state.local_extract_route.name: Route Local Extraction
state.local_extract_route.description: Use CLI tool flow or MCP-owned extract flow for text-based embedded subtitle tracks.

state.mcp_extract_source.name: Extract Source Via MCP
state.mcp_extract_source.description: Delegate MCP-owned extract flow, including bitmap OCR path when applicable.

state.cli_extract_source.name: Extract Source Via CLI
state.cli_extract_source.description: Run deterministic local extraction with preferred source-language selection.

state.group_translation_input.name: Build Translation Groups
state.group_translation_input.description: Load SRT, group cues, and build translation units from grouped timeline objects.

state.update_translation_memory.name: Update Rolling Translation Memory
state.update_translation_memory.description: Persist grouped context and translation policy state before invoking the translation engine.

state.route_translation_engine.name: Route Translation Engine
state.route_translation_engine.description: Choose MCP translation tool routing or model-owned reasoning depending on the selected mode.

state.mcp_translate.name: Translate Via MCP
state.mcp_translate.description: Delegate translation-only MCP tool calls in strict agent-driven sequence.

state.model_translate.name: Translate Via Model Reasoning
state.model_translate.description: Perform the non-deterministic language reasoning owned by the outer agent for grouped translation.

state.merge_translation.name: Merge And Write Final SRT
state.merge_translation.description: Merge translated groups back into a deterministic cue sequence and write the final SRT output.

state.mux_check.name: Check Optional Mux Output
state.mux_check.description: Optionally mux the final subtitle into the source media when muxOutputPath is requested.

state.mux_output.name: Mux Subtitle Into Media
state.mux_output.description: Persist optional mux output after the final subtitle file has been written.

state.emit_single_summary.name: Emit Single-Run Summary
state.emit_single_summary.description: Emit final output paths, selected branch, and relevant summary artifacts for the current input. Batch requests reuse this per-item summary before queue continuation.

transition.normalize_request.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.normalizeRequest to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Normalize user intent into deterministic workflow fields before any runtime branch is taken. Writes: request_kind, mode, input_path, target_language, output_path, output_policy, run_id.
transition.normalize_request.name: Normalize Request
transition.normalize_request.description: Normalize input, target language, output naming policy, and run-id seed.

transition.read_localpaths.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.readLocalPaths to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Reads: FFMPEG_BIN_DIR. Writes: ffmpeg_bin_dir.
transition.read_localpaths.name: Read Local Paths
transition.read_localpaths.description: Load remembered local runtime paths before probing or extraction.

transition.execution_profile_missing_req.name: Missing Request Kind
transition.execution_profile_missing_req.description: Ask for execution profile details when request kind is still missing.

transition.execution_profile_missing_mod.name: Missing Mode
transition.execution_profile_missing_mod.description: Ask for execution profile details when operating mode is still missing.

transition.execution_profile_missing_tar.name: Missing Target Language
transition.execution_profile_missing_tar.description: Ask for execution profile details when target language is still missing.

transition.execution_profile_missing_run.name: Missing Run Id
transition.execution_profile_missing_run.description: Ask for execution profile details when run correlation is still missing.

transition.execution_profile_ready.name: Execution Profile Ready
transition.execution_profile_ready.description: Continue once the minimum routing profile is already available.

transition.ask_execution_profile.designNotes: AskUser seam. Collect any missing fields required to continue deterministically: request_kind(single|batch), mode(cli|mcp), input_path or input_list_path, target_language, output_path or output_dir, output_suffix policy, whether MCP setup may modify workspace config, and whether optional mux output is requested. Resume should write normalized fields back into context before entering route_request_kind.
transition.ask_execution_profile.name: Collect Execution Profile
transition.ask_execution_profile.description: Ask for the missing execution profile so routing can proceed without implicit assumptions.

transition.route_batch_request.name: Batch Request
transition.route_batch_request.description: Queue-driven repetition of the same single-item subtitle pipeline for folder, season, series, or library processing.

transition.batch_init.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.initializeBatchWorkspace to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Use SUBTITLEEXTRACTSLATOR_TEMPDIR first; else OS temp + SubtitleExtractslator; workspace path is <temp-root>/agent-runs/<run-id>/ Writes: temp_root, run_workspace, run_id.
transition.batch_init.name: Initialize Batch Workspace
transition.batch_init.description: Resolve centralized temp state root and initialize or resume the batch run workspace.

transition.batch_build_queue.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.buildOrReconcileQueue to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Keep deterministic output naming and reconcile existing outputs before selecting new work. Writes: queue_count, queue_txt, completed_txt, failed_txt, in_progress_txt, run_notes_md.
transition.batch_build_queue.name: Build Or Reconcile Queue
transition.batch_build_queue.description: Create queue state files and reconcile resume state before worker dispatch.

transition.batch_finished.name: Batch Queue Empty
transition.batch_finished.description: Batch run can finish when queue.txt is empty after reconciliation.

transition.batch_has_work.name: Batch Has Pending Work
transition.batch_has_work.description: Continue by binding the next pending item into the shared single-item workflow path.

transition.batch_use_subagent.name: Use Worker Subagent
transition.batch_use_subagent.description: Preferred bounded-batch execution path when the platform supports subagents.

transition.batch_use_inline_worker.name: Use Inline Worker
transition.batch_use_inline_worker.description: Fallback bounded-batch execution path when subagents are unavailable.

transition.batch_subagent_worker.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate a bounded batch selected by the supervisor. Worker must return exact Completed:/Failed:/Notes: deltas and must not redefine queue semantics.
transition.batch_subagent_worker.name: Delegate Worker Batch
transition.batch_subagent_worker.description: Run the selected bounded batch through a worker subagent.

transition.batch_inline_worker.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.runInlineWorkerBatch to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Same worker contract as delegated subagent path, but executed inline. Writes: completed_delta, failed_delta, notes_delta.
transition.batch_inline_worker.name: Run Inline Worker
transition.batch_inline_worker.description: Execute the bounded worker batch inline while preserving the same delta contract.

transition.batch_apply_deltas.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.applyBatchDeltas to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Update state files before any further batch decision is made. Writes: queue_txt, completed_txt, failed_txt, in_progress_txt, run_notes_md, cooldown_required.
transition.batch_apply_deltas.name: Apply Worker Deltas
transition.batch_apply_deltas.description: Persist worker deltas back into centralized queue files.

transition.batch_wait_for_resume.name: Need Cooldown
transition.batch_wait_for_resume.description: Enter delayed serial mode for a rate-limited lane.

transition.batch_continue.name: Continue Batch
transition.batch_continue.description: Return to pending-queue dispatch when no cooldown gate is active.

transition.batch_wait_resume.designNotes: WaitResume seam. Resume when cooldown elapsed, external callback arrived, or a human explicitly resumes the affected lane. Resume should preserve run_id and existing queue files.
transition.batch_wait_resume.name: Wait For Cooldown Or Resume Signal
transition.batch_wait_resume.description: Pause the affected lane until an external signal allows the batch to continue.

transition.emit_batch_summary.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.emitBatchSummary to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Reads: completed_txt, failed_txt, run_notes_md. Writes: batch_summary, result_artifacts.
transition.emit_batch_summary.name: Emit Batch Summary
transition.emit_batch_summary.description: Emit the final batch result payload and relevant artifacts.

transition.route_mcp_mode.name: MCP Mode
transition.route_mcp_mode.description: Use MCP-first policy when mode is explicitly mcp.

transition.route_cli_mode.name: CLI Mode
transition.route_cli_mode.description: Use CLI fallback policy when mode is not mcp.

transition.mcp_preflight.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.validateMcpPrerequisites to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: ffmpeg_bin_dir, workspace_mcp_config. Writes: mcp_configured, mcp_server_entry.
transition.mcp_preflight.name: Validate MCP Prerequisites
transition.mcp_preflight.description: Check the MCP setup contract and remembered FFmpeg path before continuing.

transition.mcp_needs_setup.name: MCP Needs Setup
transition.mcp_needs_setup.description: Workspace MCP configuration must be created or updated.

transition.ask_mcp_setup.designNotes: AskUser seam. Ask whether the workflow may create or update the current workspace MCP config. Required fields on resume: mcp_setup_allowed(true|false), mcp_config_path(optional override), mcp_server_name(optional override).
transition.ask_mcp_setup.name: Ask To Configure MCP
transition.ask_mcp_setup.description: Ask whether MCP configuration may be created or updated for this workspace.

transition.apply_mcp_setup.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Outer agent must update or merge the MCP config using dotnet + absolute SubtitleExtractslator.Cli.dll path, preserve unrelated servers, optionally persist FFMPEG_BIN_DIR, and return mcp_configured=true on success.
transition.apply_mcp_setup.name: Apply MCP Setup
transition.apply_mcp_setup.description: Delegate MCP configuration update to the outer agent.

transition.ffmpeg_preflight.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.validateFfmpegPath to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Check whether ffmpeg and ffprobe are reachable from the remembered bin directory or current PATH. Reads: ffmpeg_bin_dir. Writes: ffmpeg_ready.
transition.ffmpeg_preflight.name: Validate FFmpeg Path
transition.ffmpeg_preflight.description: Check whether media tooling is ready before probing or extracting subtitles from video.

transition.ffmpeg_ready.name: FFmpeg Ready
transition.ffmpeg_ready.description: Continue when FFmpeg and ffprobe are already available.

transition.ffmpeg_missing.name: FFmpeg Missing
transition.ffmpeg_missing.description: Ask for an FFmpeg bin directory when runtime tools are not ready.

transition.ask_ffmpeg_path.designNotes: AskUser seam. Collect ffmpeg_bin_dir and whether it should be persisted for future runs when media probing or extraction needs FFmpeg. Resume should write ffmpeg_bin_dir_candidate and persist_ffmpeg_path back to context.
transition.ask_ffmpeg_path.name: Ask For FFmpeg Path
transition.ask_ffmpeg_path.description: Ask for an FFmpeg bin directory that contains both ffmpeg and ffprobe.

transition.apply_ffmpeg_path.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.applyFfmpegBinDir to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: ffmpeg_bin_dir_candidate, persist_ffmpeg_path. Writes: ffmpeg_bin_dir, ffmpeg_ready.
transition.apply_ffmpeg_path.name: Apply FFmpeg Path
transition.apply_ffmpeg_path.description: Apply and optionally persist the chosen FFmpeg bin directory before resuming media operations.

transition.probe_media.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.probe to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, target_language, ffmpeg_bin_dir. Writes: probe_tracks, has_target_subtitle.
transition.probe_media.name: Probe Media
transition.probe_media.description: Probe embedded subtitles and detect whether the target language already exists.

transition.target_track_exists.name: Target Track Exists
transition.target_track_exists.description: Early completion branch when the target subtitle is already present.

transition.target_track_missing.name: Target Track Missing
transition.target_track_missing.description: Continue to auth validation before search/download or extraction flow when no target subtitle exists.

transition.emit_existing_target.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.emitExistingTargetResult to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: target-track-exists Writes: result_branch, result_artifacts.
transition.emit_existing_target.name: Emit Existing Target Result
transition.emit_existing_target.description: Emit a completed result when no further work is required.

transition.opensubtitles_auth_check.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.validateOpenSubtitlesAuth to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Check whether cached OpenSubtitles credentials are usable and return relogin guidance without collecting secrets in workflow. Writes: opensubtitles_auth_ready, opensubtitles_auth_guidance.
transition.opensubtitles_auth_check.name: Validate OpenSubtitles Auth
transition.opensubtitles_auth_check.description: Check whether cached OpenSubtitles credentials are ready before continuing.

transition.opensubtitles_auth_ready.name: OpenSubtitles Auth Ready
transition.opensubtitles_auth_ready.description: Continue to OpenSubtitles search when cached credentials are still usable.

transition.opensubtitles_auth_missing.name: OpenSubtitles Relogin Required
transition.opensubtitles_auth_missing.description: Pause for an external auth login when cached OpenSubtitles credentials are missing or expired.

transition.ask_opensubtitles_auth_relogi.designNotes: AskUser seam. Do not collect API key, username, or password. Instruct the user to run `subtitle auth login` out of band, then resume once cached credentials have been refreshed.
transition.ask_opensubtitles_auth_relogi.name: Request OpenSubtitles Relogin
transition.ask_opensubtitles_auth_relogi.description: Ask the user to complete an external OpenSubtitles auth login and then retry auth validation.

transition.opensubtitles_search.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.opensubtitlesSearch to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Search primary target-language first, then normalized target-language, then same queries without language filter. Reads: input_path, target_language. Writes: opensubtitles_candidate_count, opensubtitles_candidates, search_query_primary, search_query_normalized.
transition.opensubtitles_search.name: Search OpenSubtitles
transition.opensubtitles_search.description: Search OpenSubtitles in strict serial order using deterministic query fallbacks.

transition.opensubtitles_candidates_foun.name: Candidates Found
transition.opensubtitles_candidates_foun.description: Proceed to explicit adoption decision when candidates exist.

transition.opensubtitles_candidates_miss.name: No Candidates
transition.opensubtitles_candidates_miss.description: Fall back to embedded subtitle extraction when OpenSubtitles returns no usable candidate.

transition.ask_candidate_adoption.designNotes: AskUser seam. Ask whether to adopt the current highest-ranked OpenSubtitles candidate. Resume should write use_opensubtitles_candidate(true|false), selected_candidate_rank, and optional candidate_notes back to context.
transition.ask_candidate_adoption.name: Ask To Adopt Candidate
transition.ask_candidate_adoption.description: Ask whether the current OpenSubtitles candidate should be used.

transition.adopt_candidate_no.name: Reject Candidate
transition.adopt_candidate_no.description: Use embedded subtitle extraction instead of the OpenSubtitles candidate.

transition.select_source_subtitle_track.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.selectEmbeddedSourceSubtitleTrack to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Mirror CLI fallback source-track selection. Prefer a non-target embedded source track, keep its language token, and flag bitmap codecs such as PGS/DVD subtitle for OCR reconstruction. Reads: probe_tracks, target_language. Writes: preferred_source_language, selected_source_subtitle_order, selected_source_language, selected_source_codec, selected_source_is_bitmap.
transition.select_source_subtitle_track.name: Select Embedded Source Track
transition.select_source_subtitle_track.description: Choose the embedded source subtitle track that will be used for fallback extraction.

transition.source_subtitle_is_bitmap.name: Bitmap Subtitle Track
transition.source_subtitle_is_bitmap.description: Use frame extraction and OCR when the selected embedded source subtitle is image-based.

transition.source_subtitle_is_text.name: Text Subtitle Track
transition.source_subtitle_is_text.description: Use normal embedded subtitle extraction when the selected source track already carries text cues.

transition.export_bitmap_subtitle_stream.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.exportBitmapSubtitleStream to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, selected_source_subtitle_order, ffmpeg_bin_dir. Writes: bitmap_sup_path, bitmap_artifact_directory.
transition.export_bitmap_subtitle_stream.name: Export Bitmap Subtitle Stream
transition.export_bitmap_subtitle_stream.description: Export the selected embedded bitmap subtitle stream to SUP before decoding frame images.

transition.decode_bitmap_subtitle_frames.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.decodeBitmapSubtitleFrames to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Decode the SUP stream into one timestamped image artifact per subtitle cue when the embedded stream is PGS/DVD-style bitmap subtitles. Reads: bitmap_sup_path. Writes: bitmap_png_directory, bitmap_timeline_path, bitmap_frame_count.
transition.decode_bitmap_subtitle_frames.name: Decode Bitmap Subtitle Frames
transition.decode_bitmap_subtitle_frames.description: Decode timestamped subtitle images from the exported bitmap subtitle stream.

transition.ocr_bitmap_subtitle_frames.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.ocrBitmapSubtitleFrames to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Run OCR on the timestamped subtitle images and rebuild a text SRT that preserves cue timing before translation. Reads: bitmap_png_directory, bitmap_timeline_path, selected_source_language. Writes: source_subtitle_path, source_language, ocr_rebuilt_cue_count.
transition.ocr_bitmap_subtitle_frames.name: OCR Bitmap Subtitle Frames
transition.ocr_bitmap_subtitle_frames.description: Rebuild a text subtitle file from the decoded bitmap subtitle images.

transition.mcp_download_candidate.designNotes: McpCall seam. Outer agent must call MCP opensubtitles_download with fileId from the prior search result and explicit output path. Auth must still use subtitle auth aquire semantics.
transition.mcp_download_candidate.name: Download Candidate Through MCP
transition.mcp_download_candidate.description: Delegate OpenSubtitles candidate download to MCP tool execution.

transition.cli_download_candidate.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.opensubtitlesDownload to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, target_language, selected_candidate_rank, selected_candidate_file_id, output_path. Writes: downloaded_subtitle_path, downloaded_is_target_language, timing_check_required.
transition.cli_download_candidate.name: Download Candidate Through CLI
transition.cli_download_candidate.description: Run deterministic CLI OpenSubtitles download for the selected candidate.

transition.need_timing_check.name: Need Timing Check
transition.need_timing_check.description: Timing validation is required before accepting the downloaded subtitle.

transition.skip_timing_check.name: Skip Timing Check
transition.skip_timing_check.description: Proceed directly when no timing validation is required.

transition.subtitle_timing_check.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.subtitleTimingCheck to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, downloaded_subtitle_path. Writes: timing_ok, timing_verdict.
transition.subtitle_timing_check.name: Run Subtitle Timing Check
transition.subtitle_timing_check.description: Compare subtitle timing with source media before accepting a low-confidence candidate.

transition.timing_ok.name: Timing Acceptable
transition.timing_ok.description: Accept the candidate when timing is close enough.

transition.timing_bad.name: Timing Rejected
transition.timing_bad.description: Advance to the next candidate when the timing check fails.

transition.advance_candidate_rank.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.advanceOpenSubtitlesCandidateRank to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Try the next candidate; do not stop the whole run because one candidate mismatched. Writes: selected_candidate_rank, selected_candidate_file_id.
transition.advance_candidate_rank.name: Advance Candidate Rank
transition.advance_candidate_rank.description: Move to the next OpenSubtitles candidate after a failed timing validation.

transition.downloaded_is_target_language.name: Downloaded Subtitle Already Target Language
transition.downloaded_is_target_language.description: Downloaded subtitle can be emitted directly without translation.

transition.downloaded_needs_translation.name: Downloaded Subtitle Needs Translation
transition.downloaded_needs_translation.description: Continue into grouped translation when the downloaded subtitle is not already the target language.

transition.write_downloaded_output.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.acceptDownloadedTargetSubtitle to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: opensubtitles-target-language Reads: downloaded_subtitle_path, output_path. Writes: result_branch, result_artifacts.
transition.write_downloaded_output.name: Accept Downloaded Target Subtitle
transition.write_downloaded_output.description: Persist the downloaded target-language subtitle as the final output.

transition.mcp_extract_source.designNotes: McpCall seam. Outer agent must invoke MCP extract in strict sequence, reuse or persist FFmpeg bin dir, and return extracted subtitle path plus detected source language.
transition.mcp_extract_source.name: Extract Source Through MCP
transition.mcp_extract_source.description: Delegate source subtitle extraction to MCP tool flow.

transition.cli_extract_source.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.extract to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, preferred_source_language, ffmpeg_bin_dir. Writes: source_subtitle_path, source_language.
transition.cli_extract_source.name: Extract Source Through CLI
transition.cli_extract_source.description: Extract the preferred source subtitle locally through CLI runtime.

transition.group_translation_input.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.buildTranslationGroups to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: source_subtitle_path, input_path, target_language. Writes: cue_count, group_count, translation_units, grouping_policy.
transition.group_translation_input.name: Build Translation Groups
transition.group_translation_input.description: Load SRT, group cues, and build translation units for deterministic merging later.

transition.update_translation_memory.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.updateRollingTranslationMemory to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Contract: Preserve grouped context across translation and resume boundaries. Writes: rolling_translation_memory, translation_context_window.
transition.update_translation_memory.name: Update Rolling Translation Memory
transition.update_translation_memory.description: Persist grouped translation context before invoking the active translation engine.

transition.translate_via_model.name: Translate Via Model
transition.translate_via_model.description: Outer-agent model reasoning path used by CLI translation flow.

transition.mcp_translate.designNotes: McpCall seam. Outer agent must invoke MCP translate in strict sequence, preserve sampling-only behavior, and return translated groups or explicit failure without external endpoint fallback.
transition.mcp_translate.name: Translate Through MCP
transition.mcp_translate.description: Delegate grouped translation to MCP translation-only tooling.

transition.model_translate.designNotes: ModelThink seam. Outer agent owns the non-deterministic language reasoning for grouped translation. Preserve grouped context window, target language, and output naming policy when resuming.
transition.model_translate.name: Translate Through Model Reasoning
transition.model_translate.description: Delegate grouped translation reasoning to the outer agent model.

transition.merge_translation.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.mergeTranslatedGroups to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: translated_groups, output_path. Writes: final_subtitle_path, result_branch.
transition.merge_translation.name: Merge Translated Groups
transition.merge_translation.description: Merge translated groups and write the final SRT output.

transition.need_mux_output.name: Mux Requested
transition.need_mux_output.description: Optional mux output path has been requested.

transition.skip_mux_output.name: No Mux Requested
transition.skip_mux_output.description: Skip muxing when no mux output is requested.

transition.mux_output.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate subtitle.muxSubtitleIntoVideo to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Reads: input_path, final_subtitle_path, mux_output_path, target_language. Writes: muxed_output_path.
transition.mux_output.name: Mux Subtitle Into Media
transition.mux_output.description: Persist the optional muxed media artifact.

transition.emit_single_summary.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.emitSingleSummary to an outer skill-runner agent instead of assuming SO will execute the custom command transition internally. Reads: result_branch, final_subtitle_path, muxed_output_path. Writes: single_summary, result_artifacts.
transition.emit_single_summary.name: Emit Single Summary
transition.emit_single_summary.description: Emit the current single-item result payload and related artifacts before final completion or batch continuation.

state.ensure_cli_runtime.name: Ensure CLI Runtime Host
state.ensure_cli_runtime.description: Ensure the external SubtitleExtractslator CLI host can start. If dotnet is missing, install the minimal .NET 9 runtime required by lib/net9.0 rather than the full SDK.

state.single_completion_route.name: Route Completion
state.single_completion_route.description: After each single-item summary, either finish the request or return the result to the batch queue loop.

transition.ensure_cli_runtime.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate runtime-host verification to an outer skill-runner agent. It must confirm that dotnet can host SubtitleExtractslator.Cli.dll, install or reuse the minimal .NET 9 runtime when missing, and resume with dotnet_runtime_available plus any resolved runtime install path.
transition.ensure_cli_runtime.name: Ensure CLI Runtime Host
transition.ensure_cli_runtime.description: Delegate portable CLI runtime-host verification and minimal .NET runtime bootstrap to an outer skill-runner agent.

transition.batch_prepare_single_run.designNotes: SubagentCall seam. Delegate workflow.prepareNextSingleRun to an outer skill-runner agent instead of relying on an SO built-in tool lookup. Contract: Load one pending queue item and map it into the same single-item subtitle pipeline used by direct translate and translate-batch CLI execution. Writes: current_batch_item, input_path, output_path, input_extension.
transition.batch_prepare_single_run.name: Prepare Next Single Run
transition.batch_prepare_single_run.description: Bind the next pending queue item into the shared single-item orchestration path.

transition.complete_batch_item.name: Continue Batch Queue
transition.complete_batch_item.description: Return the current single-item result to the batch queue loop.

transition.complete_single_request.name: Finish Single Request
transition.complete_single_request.description: Finish immediately when the request was not queue-driven.

context.merged_context: Single-file path mirrors WorkflowOrchestrator.RunWorkflowAsync: probe, target-exists early exit, OpenSubtitles search/adopt or local extract, grouped translation, optional mux, artifact emit. Batch path wraps that same single-file path with centralized queue files under <temp-root>/agent-runs/<run-id>/, queue-level cooldown/resume handling, and per-item result write-back instead of a separate subtitle business graph.
